title: SERCHHIPAH MISSION AIDS SURAKSHA KALPUI DAN TUR SAWIHO
content:
4912/2025-2026

Dated Serchhip, the 18thMarch, 2026:Vawiin khan Serchhip District AIDS Prevention &  Control Committee Meeting chu DC Pu Paul L Khuma hovin DC Meeting Hall-ah neih a ni

Mission AIDS Suraksha chungchang vawiiin meeting ah hian sawiho a ni a. District Sahyogi Pi K. Lalbiaksangi chuan HIV/AIDS dona kawnga Serchhip District hmalaknate  a sawi a. Mission AIDS Suraksha chungchang sawifiahna ngaihthlak a ni.

Mission AIDS Suraksha GOAL 95:95:99 achieve theih nana hmalak dan turte sawiho a ni a. 95:95:99 awmzia chu people living with HIV (PLHIV) 95% talin an nihna an inhriat theihna tura zauzawka test neih te; HIV hrik pai 95% ten Antiretroviral Therapy (ART) tha taka an lak te; ART la tu 99% ten an thatpui a, midang kai chhawng thei lo khawpa viral load hniam neih tir te chu a tum a ni.

He meeting ah hian Serchhip NACP Staff-te bakah Serchhip SP Pu Gavit Gogna te, Serchhip District Medical Superintendent, YMA Sub Headquaters aiawh, DPO WCD, Serchhip DEO, Asst. Commissioner Serchhip Excise & Narcotics, Dist. VC Association aiawh bakah Dist. Jail aiawhte an tel a ni.

Attachment

title: CHAMPHAIAH BANA KAIH SCHEME CHUNGCHANGAH DISTRICT LEVEL WORKSHOP NEIH A NI
content:
4911/2025-2026Champhai, dated 18th March 2026:Vawiin khan District Monitoring Committee (DMC) for Bana Kaih Scheme buatsaihin Circuit House Conference Hall-ah Bana kaih (Handholding) chungchang workshop neih a ni a, Dr KC Malsawmzauva, Adviser to CM ( Implementation of Handholding Policy) in a telpui a, Dr Peter Malsawmtluanga, SDO(S) leh Member Secretary DMC ni bawk chuan hun a kaihruai a. Pu Mohammad Aaquib, DC Champhai in thu sawina hun a nei bawk a ni.

Dr KC Malsawmzauva, Adviser to CM (Handholding Policy) chuan District Monitoring Committee in Bana Kaih chungchanga workshop a buatsaih chu lawmawm a tih thu a sawi a, mi zawng zawng hi sawrkar hnain a daih tawh loh avangin entrepreneurship chu ngaih pawimawh a hun thu leh hmasawnna rahbi rap tura puih tlak ni tura, mahni in tanpuia kan rilru kan siam thar a tul hle a, quantity aia quality pawimawh ziate, project hrang hrangte chu bank kalphung zul zuia tih a nih avangin monitoring leh document tha neih a pawimawh ziate a sawi bawk.

Member Secretary Dr Peter Malsawmtluanga chuan Bana Kaih Scheme chungchanga hma lak tawhna hrang hrang report a pe a, Pu Lawmkima Lead District Manager chuan Bank lam kaihhnawih hrang hrang leh loan pekchhuah tawh dan report a pe a, Bana Kaih Scheme lo dawng tawhte hlawhtlinnna thawnthu leh Bana Kaih Loan Component dil dan screen play en ho a ni bawk.

Vawiin workshop-ah hian Pi Laldikkimi leh Pu Zohmingthanga, Member, MSPCC te chuan Bana Kaih Scheme leh KCC chungchang inzirtirna hun an hman bakah zawhna leh chhanna hun an hmang a, Pu Lalchhuanawma Ralte, SDC chuan lawmthu sawiin hun a khar a ni.

Bana kaih (Handholding) chungchang workshop neih zawh hnu hian Dr KC Malsawmzauva Adviser to CM (Implementation of Handholding Policy) hian Mualkawi Ginger Secondary Collection Centre, Khuangleng Ginger Secondary Collection Centre leh Ginger Processing Unit tlawhin a hnathawh dan leh an hma lakna hrang hrang a hmunah kalin a enpui a ni.

Attachment

4910/2025-2026

title: MAMIT DISTRICT-A  IWRD LEH FISHERIES DEPARTMENT HMALAKNA KAL MEK LEH HMACHHAWPTE EN HO
content:
4909/2025-2026

Dated Aizawl, 18thMarch 2026:Nimin Thawhlehni khan Irrigation and Water Resources leh Fisheries Department Secretary Er. Lalrothanga leh a thawhpuite - Er. K. Hamlet, IWRD Chief Engineer te, IWRD official-te leh Fisheries Department official-te chuan Mamit huam chhunga IWRD leh Fisheries Department hmalakna kal mek leh hmachhawpte an tlawh a. Mamit khawtlang hruaituten an tawiawm bawk.

Tuidai multipurpose Project-a tuikhuahna hmunhma an tlawhnaah hian Secretary Er. Lalrothanga chuan he project hlawhtlin nana hmalaknate a sawi a, Mamit khawtlang tana a tangkai dan tur te, khualzinte tana hmun nuam tak ruahman tel tum a nih thute sawiin ram tana ro tling din tum a nih thu a sawi a. He Tuidai Dam hi meter 18 a sanga khuah tur niin a dil zau zawng tur hi Hectare18 vel a ni a, khuah zawh a nih hunah chuan huan hectare 700 vel chawm theiin, khaw mipuite tui tlan atan pawh a tangkai hle dawn a ni a ti bawk.

Hemi ni vek hian Darlakah Leilet neitute leh Sangha khawitute nen inkawm hona hun hman a ni bawk a, he hunah hian leilet neitute leh sangha khawituten an harsatna ber tui chungchang pawh sawi ho niin an harsatna sut kian a nih theih nan sawrkar-in chak taka hma a lak mek thute sawi a ni bawk. Darlak lui khuahna tur hmun remchang ruahman tawh chu a hmunah en nghal a ni bawk a, a khaw mite nen tangkai taka hman a nih theih nan ruahmanna siam ni se an ti a. Zan lamah Zawlnuam khawtlang hruaitu, zau hruaitute leh Sangha khawitu te nen inkawmna neih leh niin sangha tin siamna hmun pawh tlawh a ni bawk.

Hei bakah hian Fisheries Department hmun hmate leh IWRD hmalakna te tlawh a ni bawk a, farmer-te harsatna hrang hrangte chinfel dan turte sawi ho niin Serlui B tuikhuah atanga Kawlphetha siam tawhna tui lo luang chhuak pawh tangkai taka hman chhunzawm a nih theihna turin ruahmanna siam a ni bawk.

Attachment

title: JORDAN CENTER, SETHAWN MIZORAM SYNOD KUTA HLANNA TUR INREMNA ZIAH A NI
content:
4908/2025-2026Aizawl, 18th March, 2026 :Vawiin chawhnu dar 3:00 khan Pi Lalrinpuii, Minister, Social Welfare, Women & Child Development Department hovin a pisaah Jordan Center, Sethawn Mizoram Synod kuta hlanna tur inremna (Memorandum of Agreement) chu ziah fel a ni a. He inremna ah hian Commissioner & Secretary, Social Welfare, Women & Child Development Pi Lalzarmawii, IAS leh Rev. John Raldosanga, Moderator, Mizoram Synod ten hming an ziak a, hriatpuituah Sorkar lam atangin Pi Zonunthari, Joint Secretary, SW&WCD leh Pi Caroline Hmingthanzuali, Joint Director, Social Welfare ten hming an ziak a, Mizoram Synod lamah Rev VL Luaia, Hranleh, Sr. Executive Secretary leh Rev. Dr. K.Lallawmzuala, Executive Secretary ten hming an ziak bawk.He inremna ang hi chuan Jordan Center hi Mizoram Synod enkawl turin kum 15 atan hlan a ni phawt ang a. Kumtin Sorkarin tanpuina (Grants-in-Aid) nuai 50 a pe ang a, kum 2 danah 5% a tihpun thin tur a ni dawn a ni. He hmunhma hi ruihhlo avanga harsatna tuarte tan De-Addiction emaw After Care anga kalpui tur a ni dawn a ni.

title: KHAPNA THUPEK CHHUAH
content:
4907/2025-2026

Aizawl District Magistrate Er. Lalhriatpuia, IAS chuan a hnuaia tarlan ang hian khapna thupek a chhuah

Sawrkar hriatpuina lova petrol leh diesel zawrh chhawn hi dân bawhchhiatna niin Section 5 & 6 of the Mizoram Motor Spirit and High Speed Diesel (Prevention of Malpractices in Supply and Distribution) Order, 1992 kalh tlat a ni a. Chubâkah mahni remhriat dân ang anga lo kawl that ve ngawt hi a him lovin kângmei nasa tak tichhuak thei a ni.

Chuvangin, kei, Er. Lalhriatpuia, IAS, District Magistrate, Aizawl District hian dân ang taka petrol leh diesel hralh a lo nih theihna tur leh mipuite kan lo him tlan zawk nan Section 163, BNSS 2023 in thuneihna min pêk angin a hnuai a thupek hi ka chhuah e.

“Aizawl District huamchhungah mi tumahin phalna nei lovin Petrol leh Diesel an hralh tur a ni lo.”

He khapna thupek zawm lo te chu an petrol/diesel man sak a ni anga, Section 223 BNS 2023 hmangin an chungah hremna lek theih a ni bawk ang. He thupek hi chhuah a nih atanginthla hnih (2 months)chhung a huam ang.

He thupek hi vawiinDt. 18.03.2026hian District Magistrate Seal-a nemnghetin hming ka ziah hnan e.

Sd/-

Er. LALHRIATPUA, IASDistrict MagistrateAizawl District, Mizoram

Attachment

title: Gulf War leh a chhehvel boruak avanga Gas, Diesel leh Petrol chhekkhawl lo tura Hnahthial DCSO ngenna
content:
4906/2025-2026

Dated Hnahthial, the 18th March, 2026 :Tun hnaiah Gulf War leh a chhehvel boruak chuan Mipui a ti phawklek a, a bik takin eirawngbawlna Gas, Diesel leh Petrol mamawh ai tam chhekkhawl kan in tih hmuh a, tul loah harsatna kan insiam loh nan leh Mipui te chiai mai lo turin kan in ngen a, he mi chungchangah hian a hnuai a tarlan te hi zawm theuh turin kan in hriattir a ni;

1) Tun dinhmunah eirawngbawlna Gas, Petrol leh Diesel lakluh naah harsatna a awm lo a, chutih rualin renchem taka hmang turin kan in ngen a ni.

2) Eirawngbawlna Gas chungchangah Booking kan tih ni atanga ni 25 (sawmhnih panga) hnuah chauh Booking hi a tih leh theih ang.

3) Eirawngbawlna Gas, Petrol leh Diesel engtik lai mahin dan phal loh a chhekkhawl emaw, a man ai to a hralh chhuah emaw hralh chhawn (Black Marketing) khap tlat a ni.

4) Eirawngbawlna Gas, Petrol leh Diesel te hi Ram pawn (i.e. Myanmar) lamah phurh/ hralh chhuah khap tlat a ni.

5) Petrol leh Diesel te hi phalna nei lo chuan, Bur/Gallon/Barrel a dawh emaw chhekkhawl khap tlat a ni.

Hnahthial District chhungah LPG leh POL-ah harsatna kan tawh loh nan, a chunga kan tarlan te hi zawm tha turin kan in ngen in, he thuchhuah zawm lo chu dan anga action lak zel a ni ang.

title: CHIEF MINISTER LEH HEALTH MINISTER-TE’N INTERNATIONAL WOMEN’S DAY 2026 LAWMNA HUN AN HMANPUI
content:
4905/2025-2026

Dated Aizawl, the 18th March, 2026:Vawiin khan Pu Lalduhoma, Chief Minister chuan IWD Organizing Committee, State Hub for Empowerment of Women (SHEW), Directorate of Women & Child Development-te buatsaih, International Women’s Day 2026 lawmna hun chu Dawrpui Multipurpose Centre-ah khuallian niin a hmanpui a. He hunah hian Pi Lalrinpuii, Minister, Social Welfare, Women & Child Development Department chu khualzahawm a ni bawk.

Khuallian Pu Lalduhoma chuan kalkhawmte chu Women’s Day chibai a buk a. Mizote chu hmakhawsang atanga hmeichhiate dinhmun dah hniam ve lo tia sawi theih kan ni tiin, an chan chhiatna lai ber nia lang thin, ‘mak chhiat’ an tawh chang emaw, ‘sum chhuah’ emaw-ahtea dinhmun chhe taka an awm thin chu, sawrkarin The Mizo Marriage & Inheritance of Property (Amendment) Bill, 2026 a pawm tak hmangin,  dinhmun tha zawk leh zahawm zawkah a hlangkai tih a sawi a. Sawrkar lai mek chuan hmeichhe MLA pathum lai a neih bakah Mizorama Cabinet Minister-a hmeichhia dah hmasa ber sawrkar a ni a, a thatzia chu hnam dangte pawhin hmuhpuiin, ‘Women Icon Award’ an pe hial a ni, a ti.

Chief Minister chuan mipa leh hmeichhe tih tlan theih leh nih tlan theih china tehin Mizoram chu India rama hmeichhiate dinhmun that berna state zinga mi a nih a rinawm thu sawiin, he dinhmun kan thlen theih chhan chu thil tam tak karah kan hnamzia vang te, kan sakhuana vang te leh MHIP leh hmeichhe pawl hrang hrangte hmalakna vang a ni, a ti a. Mizo hmeichhiate chu eizawnna kawngah pawh sawrkar hna sang mai piah lamah sumdawnna lamah leh entrepreneurship lamah te rilru puitling tak puin, a tlem emaw a tam emaw, eng emaw tal lo thawkchhuak ve theia awm an tum hram hram thin tih a sawi a. Hmeichhiate hmasawnna ram a nih avangin khualzinte pawhin an rawn ngaihven a, an sawi darh mek a ni, a ti.

CM chuan sawrkar kal laiin hmeichhiate a ngaihsakzia lanna pakhat chu an flagship scheme Bana Kaih-ah a ni tiin, CM Special Package Pilot phase-ah mi 2255 zinga 985 chu hmeichhia an ni a; CM Special Package Phase II, tun hnai lawka sem chhuahah mi 458 zinga 211 te chu hmeichhia an ni a; Phase II hnuaia dilna approved tawh, la sem chhuah si loh 397 awm mek zinga 196-te chu hmeichhia an ni a; Loan Component lamah pawh pilot phase-a loan sanction tawh 394 zinga mi 119 te chu hmeichhia an ni a, Phase II-a loan sanction tawh mi 10 zinga 4 hmeichhia an ni, tih a tarlang a ni.

CM Pu Lalduhoma chuan WCD hnuaia kalpui, central sawrkarin hmeichhiate hamthatna leh venhimna lama hmalaknate sawi langin, a hlawhtlin theih nan sawrkar pawh a tang hle a ni, a ti a. Hmeichhiate chunga hleihlenna reng reng chu report turin mipuite a chah a, sawrkarin a tih tur a ti zel ang tih a tiam bawk. Mizoram chu hmeichhiate leh naupangte tana ram ralmuang taka kan siam theih chuan kan ram leh hnam kan chawimawi dawn a ni, tiin, vawiina hmeichhe chawimawite chu a lawmpui thu a sawi a. Mizo hmeichhiate chu anmahnia theihna ropui tak awmte hmanga ram leh hnam tana bei zel turin a sawm a ni.

Khualzahawm Pi Lalrinpuii pawhin thu sawiin, hmeichhiate’n chanvo an chan theih reng, duhsakna an chan loh avanga an chunga tla lo tam tak a awm laiin, Chief Minister chuan Cabinet Minister atan hmeichhia ruatin, hmalakna hrang hrangah kaihruaiin, mamawh a thlente a tihhlawhtlinsak thin tih sawiin, lawmthu a sawi a. WCD chu hmeichhe hotu hruaina tha hnuaiah thawhhona tha an neih avangin hmalakna chak takin an kalpui thei a ni, a ti a. Kumin Women’s Day chu a ni takah lawm ni thei lo mah se Mizo nunphung chawisangin mi chanhai zawkte tanpui nan te, dam lo kan nan leh bai insuahtawn nan hman a nih thu a sawi a. IWD thupui angin dikna, rorelna dik leh hmalakna te chu hmeichhia leh naupang zawng zawng tan a ni tih hre thar a, an hmeichhe nihna hmang tangkai a, midangte tanpui nana mawhphurhna la thar turin kalkhawmte a sawm a, Women’s Day chibai a buk a ni.

Vawiin hunah hian NGO hrang hrangte, kohhran hrang hranga hmeichhe pawlte, Mizoram State Commission for Women (MSCW), Women’s Study Centre MZU, pavalai/mipa pawl, Mizo hmeichhe Padma Shri dawng tawh – Pi B. Sangkhumi leh Pi K.C. Runremsangi te, Zakapa Award dawng tawh – Dr. Lalrinawmi leh Pi Khawlrinpuii te, Pi K Thansiami, ex-MLA te leh midangte an tel a. Pi Lalzarmawii, Commissioner & Secretary, SW & WCD-in kaihruaiin, kalkhawmte lawmna thu a sawi a. Pi Zoramthangi Chhangte, Director, WCD-in kumin IWD thupui hmangin thu a sawi a. Mizoram chhunga hmeichhiate dinhmun leh an harsatna tawh thinte a tarlang a. Mizo mipate an thih nasat avangin kan ramah hmeithai/single mothers-te tana welfare scheme neih a pawihmawh thu sawiin, ram leh hnam, khawtlang hmasawn nan hmeichhiate chawikan a ngaih thu a sawi a ni. (A presentation-a statistics langsar zual thlalak angin dah a ni.)

Minister Pi Lalrinpuii’n Women Icon Award a dawn lawmpuina pawl hrang hrang aiawha hlan a ni a. Hlantute chu:

1. WCD aiawhin Pu Lalduhoma, Chief Minister, Mizoram

2. Dr Lalrinawmi Ralte, Zakapa Awardee 2023

3. Pi Khawlrinpuii, Zakapa Awardee 2025

3. Dr. Jane R. Ralte, President, All Mizoram Women's Federation

4. Pi Lalengthangi, Secretary, Aizawl Area BKHP Coordination (BKHP)

5. Pi Zomuanpuii Ralte, President All Mizoram Elected Women Representatives

6. Pi Zorinpuii Khiangte, Treasurer, Mizo Hmeichhe Tangrual

7. Territorial Home League Secretary, Salvation Army Territorial Women Ministries

8. Pi Lalhmingliani Hmar, President, YWCA

9. Pi Lalngaihzuali, President, Indian Christian Women's Movement: Mizoram

Kawng hrang hranga Mizo hmeichhia hlawhtlinna changte hnenah lawmpuina hlan niin, (attached file) Pi Vanlalnuntluangi, Miss Grand International, 1st Runner Up, 2025 kaihhruaiin IWD Pledge chham a ni a. Pi Lalliani, President, MHIP-in lawmthu sawiin hun a khar a ni.

Hmeichhe hlawhtlingte chawimawina hunah hian Pi Lalrinpuii, Minister chuan Mizo Hmeichhia, All India Services-a thawkte hnenah hlanin, Pi Lalzarmawii, Commissioner & Secretary chuan Sports lam leh entawntlak khawpa hlawhtlingte (Exemplary Female Achievers) hnenah a hlan a; Pu Lalduhoma, Chief Minister chuan STEM (Science, Technology, Engineering & Mathematics)-a tithate hnenah a sem a, Pi Prova Chakma, Member of Legislative Assembly chuan Gender Role Breakers (hmeichhe hna anga ngaih ngai loh thawkte) hnenah semin, Pi Zonunthari, Joint Secretary chuan Exceptional Women (Mizo hmeichhia mi bikte) hnenah a hlan a ni.

International Women's Day Committee, February ni 19, 2026-a Social Welfare, Women and Child Development Minister Pi Lalrinpuii kaihhruaina hnuaia thukhawm chuan International Women’s Day (IWD) vawi 115-na chu March ni 8 (Pathianni)-a a tlak avangin, vawiin, March ni 18 (Nilaini)-ah official function neih turin a lo rel tawh a. Kumin International Women’s Day thupui chu GIVE TO GAIN tih a ni a - Mizo tawng chuan PEKIN LUKHAWNG A NEI tia lehlin a ni.

Attachment

title: UD&PA Ministerin Aizawl West Outlet Project hna thawh tan tur khuh hawng
content:
4904/2025-2026

Aizawl, 18th March, 2026 :Vawiin chawhma dar 10:00 khan UD&PA Minister Pu K. Sapdanga chuan Aizawl West Outlet Project hna thawh tan tur a khuh hawng. Aizawl West Outlet Project hi Dinthar atanga Tuikual South inkara Tuikual lui leh a hrula kawr siam leh a chunga motor tlan theihna tur siamna tur a ni.

Aizawl West Outlet Project hna thawh tan tur khuh hawnna inkhawmah hian khuallian Pu K. Sapdanga chuan thu sawiin, khawtlang thawhhona tha tak avang leh mimal thenkhat, an chenna in thiah then ngai hial te bakah, ram pek ngai ten phal taka an pek avanga he hna hi tan theih tur a peih a lo ni ta chu lawmawm a lawmawm takzet a ni a ti a. UD&PA hmalakna hrang hrang lungphum leh hna zawh tawh hawn te tunhnaiah an ngah thu sawiin, heng hna hrang hrang hlawhtlinna atan hian Sawrkai lai mai bakah, hun hmasa lama hruaitu hmasa te'n hmathlir an lo neih that zar te pawh an zo tih a sawi bawk. Minister hian he project hi a hlawhtlin ngei theih nan hun rei tawh tak atangin Aizawl West-II bialtu MLA Pu Lalnghinglova Hmar chuan thahnemngai taka a bawhzui avangin tun hun hi kan lo thleng ta a ni a ti.

Khual zahawm bialtu MLA leh Minister of State ni bawk Pu Lalnghinglova Hmar chuan he project hlawhtlin theih nana an hmalakna hrang hrang te a sawi a. Aizawl West Outlet Project atana sum an neih chuan helai hna pum hi a daih dawn loh avangin, kawng hi laklawh deuhin a tawp dawn a, chumi chhunzawmna atan chuan UD&PA in Storm Drain Project an neih nena tangkawpin, Dinthar atanga Tuikual 'A' mual thleng tuiluankawr siamin, a chungah motor tlan theihna tur siam a ni dawn tih a sawi a, he kawng hian Dinthar, Tuikual North leh Tuikual South chuanhnuai te tan kawng pawimawh tak leh chetvel awlsam phah nan te, rikrum thilah pawh rang taka han chet vel nan a tangkai dawn hle a ni a ti. Pu Lalnghinglova Hmar hian a ngenna ngaipawimawha an tih hlawhtlin sak avangin UD&PA Minster Pu K. Sangdanga leh department official te chungah lawmthu a sawi a. Bialtu MLA hian he project atana thahnemngai taka thawktu khawtlang hruaitu hrang hrang te hnenah lawmthu sawiin, khawtlang hmasawnna dah pawimawh hmasa a an ram te phal taka petu chhungkaw engemawzat te zara he project hi thawh theih a lo chhuak ta a ni tiin lawmthu a sawi bawk. A ram phal taka petu Pu Sangthanga Tuikual South, ground survey neih ni taka che suala nunna hial a chan chu pawi a tih thu leh a tawrhpui thu a sawi bawk.

He hna hi SASCI atanga thawh tur a ni a. Project pahnih kaih kawp niin sum sen tur zawng zawng hi a vaiin cheng vaibelchhe 30.96 a ni. He hna atana Project Management Consultant chu ARDECO Design Build niin contractor pahnih Zothan Consultancy Services leh Studio Hamlet ten a hna hi an thawk dawn a ni. RCC hmangin drain tha tak siam tur niin chumi chungah chuan metre 4 a zau motor tlanna tur leh metre 1.5 a zau footpath te siam tur a ni a, a vaiin 1.68 km a thui a ni dawn a ni. He kawng hi Dinthar YMA ram hrula intanin Tuikual lui a zawh chho ang a, Tuikual A muala CT Turning point ah a chhuak ang.

He Project hawnna inkhawm hi UD&PA Comissioner & Secretary Pu Lalmalsawma Pachuauin kaihruaiin Pu Jacob Lalawmpuia, Director UD&PA in Technical Report a pe a.  Pu CC. Lalchhuangkima Addl. Secretary UD&PA in lawmthu a sawi bawk.

Attachment

title: Hnahthial-ah District Level Workshop on Hanholding Scheme buatsaih
content:
4903/2025-2026

Dated Hnahthial, the 18th March, 2026:Vawiin khan RGSA Training Hall, Hnahthialah District Level Workshop on Handholding Scheme buatsaih a ni a. Workshop hi Pi K.Vanlalruati, Hnahthial Bawrhsap chuan kaihruaiin Pu Zothanmawia Khiangte Addl. Deputy Commissioner, Hnahthial hnen atangin District chhunga Handholding hnuaia hmalak dan report ngaihthlak a ni.

Addl DC report danin tun dinhmunah hian Loan Sanction tawh hi Agriculture & Farmers' Welfare Department-ah 1, Department of Animal Husbandry and Veterinary ah 7, Commerce and Industries ah 4, leh Department of Horticulture hnuaiah 5 awmin a vaiin mi 17 hneh loan hi Sanction tawh a nih thu a tarlang a. Loan-te hi SBI, MRB leh MCAB atangte a Sanction an nih thu a tarlang bawk.

Report-ah hian loan dil zingah CIBIL score hniam vang te, mahni home branch lova dil vang te, a diltu kum tam tawh vang te leh loan diltu biaktlak tawh loh vang te a Bank lamin loan sanction theih loh an neih thu tarlan a ni.

Pi Chiinngaihkim Phiamphu, District Development Manager, NABARD in KCC chungchang leh a thiltum te sawifiahna a nei a. MSPCC (Mizoram State Policy Co Ordination) Committee member lo kal te atangin Bana Kaih hnuaia tanpuina awm thei pahnih - Loan Component leh CM Special Package chungchang sawifiahna an nei a, kalkhawmte hnehah Handholding chungchang ziahna Booklet an sem bawk a ni. An ni hian online hmanga application siam dan te entirna an neih bakah zawhna leh chhanna hun an hmanpui bawk a ni.

District Public Relations Office, Hnahthial hen atang in Bana Kaih success story hrang hrang thlir hona neih niin Addl DC, Pu Zothanmawia Khiangte chuan lawmthu sawina nen hun hi a khar a ni.

Attachment

title: Lunglei District-a ran vulhtute tan Livestock Insurance Scheme hawn a ni
content:
4902/2025-2026

Lunglei, 2026 Vau thla ni 18:Animal Husbandry & Veterinary Department scheme National Livestock Mission (NLM), Mizoram sawrkar flagship Bana Kaih (Handholding) Scheme leh National Informatics Centre (NIC) ṭang kawp hma lakna, Livestock Insurance Scheme khuh hawnna (kick-off) leh inzirtirna chu vawiin khan Lunglei District AH&Vety Conference Hall-ah buatsaih a ni.

He hun hi AH&Vety Department Joint Director (Southern Zone) Dr Ngurzidingi Sailo chuan a kaihruai a. NIC Lungleia Administrative Officer Pu Israel K. Lalawmpuia chuan Livestock Insurance Scheme awmzia leh a kalpui dan tur a zirtir a. Sawrkar leh AH&Vety Department-in ran vulhtute hma ngaia scheme ṭha tak an duang chhuak chu lawmawm a tih thu sawiin, ran vulhtute'n ṭangkai taka an hman a beisei thu a sawi.

Kick-off cum training programme-ah hian Insurance Scheme buaipuitu tur – Lunglei District AH&Vety staff-te, MzSRLM leh DAY–NULM te bakah, a chhawr ṭangkai tur Vawk Vulh Association leh Milk Union Limited Lunglei te an tel.

Livestock Insurance Scheme hian vawk, bawng, sial, kel leh beram te a huam dawn a. Mahni ran vulhte insurance ti duh chuan NIC-a thawkte leh AH&Vety Dept-a thawkte zawh fiah theih a ni.

Attachment

title: LEMCHAN – MIZORAM FILM FESTIVAL 2026-AH FILM LAMA HMARCHHAK STATE-TE HMA SAWN THEIH DAN TUR HRANG HRANG SAWI HO A NI.
content:
4901/2025-2026

Dated Aizawl, 18th March 2026 :Directorate of Information & Public Relations, Government of Mizoram leh National Film Development Corporation (NFDC), Ministry of Information & Broadcasting tangkawpin an buatsaih ‘LEMCHAN – Mizoram Film Festival 2026’ neih mekah vawiin khan Co-Festival Director Pu Pratap Chhetri kaihruaiin lemchan lama India hmarchhak state-te dinhmun leh hma sawnna tur hrang hrangte sawi hona, I&PR Mini Theatre, Lianchhari Run-ah neih a ni a, he hunah hian Northeast state hrang hrang atangin filmmaker lar Oinam Doren (Arunachal Pradesh), Alexander Leo Pou (Manipur), Napoleon RZ Thanga (Mizoram), Kivini Shohe (Nagaland), Chow Partha Borgohain (Assam), Biplab Goswami (Tripura), leh Gospel Ramdinmawia (Lersia Play) te an tel a ni.

Vawiin hun hmannaah hian Northeast-a film siamtute harsatna tawh thin hrang hrangte sawi ho niin, hmarchhak state-a film Industry-te than lenna tur hrang hrangte sawi ho a ni a, thawh hona tha lehzual neih dan tur te, Central sawrkara film lam tih hmasawn nana thawktu, Ministry of Information & Broadcasting atanga sum tam lehzual hai chhuah a nih theih dan tur te, zau zawka film theh darh a nih theih dan tur te, National Film Festival-ah hmarchhak state tinte tana film tam zawk chhuah a nih ve theih dan turte leh NFDC pawhin nasa zawka North East film-te chawi san a nih theih nana hma lak zel dan turte sawi ho a ni.

March ni 16 atanga neih tan he Lemachan-Mizoram Film Festival-ah hian Bollywood leh NFDC mite bakah, a vawi khatna atan hmarchhak state hrang hrang atangin, Film lama ram pum huapa sulhnu tha tak tak neite an kalkhawm a. Film hmasawnna tur hrang hrangte zirna leh sawi hona hunte hman niin, thenawm state-te leh Mizoram kutchhuak feature film, documentary leh short film 22 chuang chhuah a ni bawk a; vawiin tlai hian tunlaia lar tak Tribeni Rai-i film siam ‘Shape of Momo’ tih chu Mini-Theatre-ah chhuahin,Festival hi khara ni dawn a ni.

Attachment

title: DISASTER MANAGEMENT & REHABILITATION DEPARTMENT ISSUES ADVISORY
content:
In view of the recent incidences of hailstorms and the prevailing low-pressure conditions affecting several parts of the State, and based on the latest meteorological inputs indicating continued unstable weather conditions over Mizoram and the wider Northeast region, all Deputy Commissioners are hereby advised to remain in a state of heightened preparedness and to activate the respective District Emergency Operation Centres (DEOCs) with immediate effect.

As per the latest weather forecast, fairly widespread to widespread light to moderate rainfall accompanied by thunderstorm, lightning and gusty winds is likely to occur over Northeast India during 13th–19th March, with wind speeds reaching 30–50 kmph in several areas. The prevailing weather system may result in intermittent rainfall, thunderstorms and hailstorm events at isolated to scattered locations across Mizoram over the coming days.

Further, recent warnings issued by the meteorological authorities indicate the likelihood of moderate rainfall (5–15 mm/hr), thunderstorms and gusty winds in certain districts, which may lead to localized waterlogging, slippery road conditions, traffic disruption and potential damage to vulnerable structures and standing crops.

In this regard, the following measures may kindly be ensured on priority:

All districts shall undertake prompt and systematic assessment of damages arising from the recent hailstorm incidents, particularly in respect of housing, agriculture, horticulture and public infrastructure. A consolidated report indicating the nature and extent of losses may be submitted to the State Emergency Operation Centre (DEOC), Department of Disaster Management & Rehabilitation (DM&R) at the earliest.

Wherever damage has occurred, necessary relief measures may be extended to affected persons strictly in accordance with the prevailing State Disaster Response Fund (SDRF) norms, under due intimation to DM&R.

District administrations shall ensure that all relevant line departments remain on alert and undertake appropriate preventive actions, including monitoring of vulnerable locations, precautionary measures for protection of infrastructure and crops, and readiness of response mechanisms.

Adequate public communication and advisories may be disseminated through appropriate channels to ensure that citizens remain informed and adopt necessary precautionary measures during periods of adverse weather conditions.

District authorities may closely monitor weather bulletins, forecasts and warnings issued by the Meteorological Department and take appropriate action in accordance with the evolving situation. All Deputy Commissioners are requested to accord highest priority to preparedness, damage assessment and timely relief measures so as to mitigate the impact of any further hailstorm or thunderstorm events.

This may be treated as urgent.

title: HNAHLAN KHUAA GRAPE CHINGTUTE TAN TRAINING BUATSAIH
content:
4900/2025-2026

Champhai, dated 18th March 2026 :Vawiin chawhma dar 11:30 khan KVK Khawzawl leh ICAR-NRC Grapes, Pune tangkawpin Hnahlan khua-a Grape chingtute hnenah KVK Khawzawl chuan an hmunhma ngeia kalin zirtirna an pe. He hunah hian Dr. Malsawmkimi, Senior Scientist KVK Khawzawl chuan kaihruaiin tunlai khawvel thang zelah Kuthnathawktuten hma kan sawn a tul zia leh Grape tharchhuah te tun aia hlawk zawka thar thei tura theihtawp kan chhuah a tulzia leh chumi atana tunlai technology hman thiam a pawimiawh zia a sawi a.Dr. Lalngaihawmi, SMS (Plant Protection) KVK Khawzawl chuan rannung eichhetu laka grape ven dan tur te, natna hrik laka venna tur leh an grape than duhna tur vitamin chungchang te zirtirna a pe ani. Hnahlana khua-a grape chingtute hian an grape chawr rual lo hi an harsatna ani tel thin a, a chawr rual theih dan tur KVK-a thawktute hian zirtirna an pe bawk. He hunah hian kalkhawmte hnenah grape enkawlna atana leitha, rannung thahna hlo leh natna enkawlna tur bakah vitamin te an pe chhuak nghal a ni.KVK Khawzawl hian TSP (Tribal Sub Plan) hnuaiah Hnahlan leh Chawngtlai khuaa grape chingtute hnenah tun aia hlawk zawka an tharchhuah theih nan theihtawp an chhuah mek a ni.

Attachment

title: DD MIZORAM INDIGENOUS GAMES & CULTURAL FESTIVAL 2026 HAWNNA HUN ART & CULTURE MINISTER-IN A HMANPUI
content:
4899/2025-2026

Aizawl, 18th March, 2026 :Doordarshan Aizawl leh Mizoram Indigenous Games Association (MIGA) thawkdunin an buatsaih Doordarshan Mizoram Indigenous Games & Cultural Festival 2026 chu vawiin hian Ramhlun Sports Complex-ah hawn niin Art & Culture Minister Pu C Lalsawivunga’n he hun hi a hmanpui.

Art& Culture Dept. changtu Khuallian Pu C. Lalsawivunga chuan vawiin hi kan bultan nan ngaihtuahna thui tak senga kan hman a tul thu sawiin, hnam tin in tihdan phung kan neih angin kan culture te hi kan ngaihsan a, kan ngaihlut a kan vawn nun zel a pawipawh thu a sawi a, vawiin neih tan ni thum awh tur, Indigenous games hian mizo kan nih anga kan tihdan kan nunphung, kan culture a bet tlat infiamna kan chawinung thar leh dawn tiin a hlu hle a ti bawk. Minister chuan tunlaiah infiamna chi hrang hrang khawvel pum huap leh India pum huap in a awm chho zel a, keini mizo tehian pi leh pu atanga kan tih ve dan kan infiamna hi kan theihnghilh lek lek tawh tih theihin a awm a, Doordarshan Kendra leh MIGA tangkawp in, mizo te in a kan lo kalpui thin leh hlim taka kan pi leh pu te atanga kan lo hman tawh dan te chawilar leh duhna thinlung lo awm a he hun hlu tak an buatsaih anihi lawmawm a tih thu a sawi tel bawk.

Khuallian chuan, Culture hi a thang a, kan ei leh in tepawh a lo danglam chho zel a, kan nitin nun tepawh alo in thlak a, hmasawn tur pawh kanni, hmasawnna kawngzawh hi kan nihna tur leh kan tihtur pawh ani a, amaherawhchu kan nunphung te alo in thlak a, ei leh in thlenga alo in inthlak takah hian pi leh pu te atanga kan chin thin, thil tha vawiin ni atanga infiamna chi hrang hrang kan entir tur hi a hlamzuih ang tih a hlauhawm em em a ati a, chuvang chuan vawiin ni hian mizo zawng zawng ten kan infiamna pi leh pu te atanga lo awm tawh kan neih hi hre thar leh ila chawi thar leh tur leh hlim taka kan hman theih nan, kan hnam nunphung leh kan tihdan phung te chawilar chho zel turin kan in buatsaih chhoh zel a tul a, a ti a, thangthar ten mizo infiamna chi hrang hrang an hre tha tawh lova, chin dan tha zawk leh kan culture hi an hnenah hian tuh thar leh te hi a tul hle a ti hawk.

Hawnna inkhawmah hi Pu VL Thakima, Secretary, DD MIG & Cultural Festival 2026 Organasing Committee chuan thuhma sawiin, Tv Lalbiaknunga, Gen Secy, MIGA General Hqrs. chuan report a pe a, Chhawkhlei Cultural Club (PUC)-te’n Hlado an chham bakah Hnam lam an entir a, he hunah hian Lilac leh David Darlong-te’n kalkhawmte zaiin an awi bawk a ni.

Doordarshan Mizoram Indigenous Games & Cultural Festival 2026 hi Zirtawpni thleng neih tur niin hemi chhung hian Inbuan, Insuk nawr, Insaihruipawh, Inarpasual, Kalchhet, Invawr leh Kawikah hmangtein inelna neih a ni dawn a, zan lamah Zoram chhunga zaithiam lar ber berte nen hun hmanho thin a ni bawk ang.

Attachment

title: RESTRICTION ON USE OF VEHICLES ON POLL DAY.
content:
553/2025-2026

Whereas, the State Election Commission, Mizoram has issued the schedule for General Election to Aizawl Municipal Corporation, 2026 on 18.03.2026, according to which the poll shall take place on 21stApril, 2026.

Therefore, in the interest of preserving the fairness of election process and rendering the same reflection of true choice of the people, the State Election Commission, in exercise of the powers vested in it under Section 27 of the Mizoram Municipalities Act, 2007 and Rule 10 of the Mizoram Municipalities (Election of Councillors) Rules, 2007 and other powers enabling it in this behalf, hereby issues the following restrictions on the use of vehicles on Poll Day for the General Election to Aizawl Municipal Corporation, 2026:

In these four wheel vehicles not more than 5 persons including driver will be allowed to move on the day of poll. On the day of poll, no other person will be allowed to use the Vehicle allotted for candidate’s or his election agent’s use.

The State Election Commission further orders that the District Administration shall keep a close watch on the vehicles used by persons accompanying the contesting candidates and their supporters for any possible mischief, including criminal activities like carrying of illegal arms and weapons. If any of these vehicles, either of a contesting candidate or a private owner, is found to be involved in any such act or for carrying anti-social elements with a view to intimidating or creating terror in the minds of the voters, it should be the duty of the District Administration to impound such vehicles and not to release them till the process of election is completed. In addition, action against the owner, the occupant/occupants and the candidate who is involved in such illegal activities shall also be taken as per law.

title: BAN ON TRANSFER, RECRUITMENT, ETC.
content:
In exercise of the powers conferred under Section 350 of the Mizoram Municipalities Act, 2007 read with Rule 31 and Rule 50 of the Mizoram Municipalities (Election of Councillors) Rules, 2007, the State Election Commission has issued Model Code of Conduct for the guidance of Political Parties and Candidates during the General Election to Aizawl Municipal Corporation, 2026 which has come into effect from the date of announcement of Election i.e.18.03.2026 and the same shall remain in force till such time the election process is completed on 30.04.2026.

In addition to the above, the Commission hereby issues the following instructions for compliance of all concerned during the ensuing General Election to Aizawl Municipal Corporation, 2026:

All Administrative Departments/Head of Departments/Head of Offices are expected to cooperate with the State Election Commission in its onerous duties of conducting free and fair elections to Aizawl Municipal Corporation. Violation of any of the above will be seriously viewed by the State Election Commission.

title: EIRAWNG BAWLNA GAS LEH TUIALHTHEI CHUNGCHANGA LUNGLEI DCSO AṬANGA MIPUITE HRIATTIRNA LEH NGENNA
content:
4898/2025-2026

Lunglei, 2026 Vau thla ni 18:Vawiin khan Lunglei District Civil Supplies Officer Pu Lalremruata Sailo chuan a hnuaia mi ang hian mipuite ngenna leh hriattirna a chhuah:Tun lai US, Israel leh Iran buaina avanga eirawng bawlna gas, diesel leh petrol-a harsatna kan tawh loh nan Central leh State level-ah sawrkarin theih tawp a chhuah mek a. Tun dinhmunah hian eirawng bawlna gas, diesel leh petrol-ah harsatna a awm rih lo va. Chu vangin, hemi chungchangah hian mipuite chi-ai lo turin kan inhriattir e. Chutih rualin, a hnuaia hriattirna hrang hrangte hi zawm ṭheuh turin mipuite kan inngen bawk a ni.1. Eirawng bawlna gas hi renchem taka hman tur a ni a, kan mamawh bak lak khawl loh tur a ni. Gas booking hi i lak ni aṭanga ni 25 hnuah chauh booking a tihnawn leh theih ang.2. Eirawng bawlna gas chheprelh leh zawrh chhawn hi khap tlat a ni a. Chuti anga lo titute kan hriat chuan thuneitute hnenah report tur a ni.3. Diesel leh petrol hi thuneitute'n phalna an pekte chauh lo chuan bur/gallon/barrel-a lak chhuah phal a ni lo.

Attachment

title: JOINT CONTROL ROOM SET UP IN LUNGLEI TO MONITOR POL AND LPG SUPPLY
content:
549/2025-2026Lunglei, 18 March 2026:The Deputy Commissioner of Lunglei District, Pi Navneet Mann, has issued a notification designating the District Emergency Operation Centre (DEOC) as the Joint Control Room to monitor the availability and distribution of essential commodities, particularly Petroleum, Oil & Lubricants (POL) and Liquefied Petroleum Gas (LPG), across the district.

The decision has been taken in compliance with directives from the Government of Mizoram, aimed at ensuring the uninterrupted supply of essential commodities and curbing misinformation in view of potential disruptions in international energy supply chains.

The Joint Control Room, which has become operational with immediate effect, will monitor supply conditions, address related issues, and take necessary measures to prevent hoarding, black marketing, and the spread of misinformation that could lead to public panic. Citizens may contact the DEOC at 9862653478 for assistance or information.

The Control Room will function under a committee comprising the Deputy Commissioner, Superintendent of Police, District Civil Supplies Officer, District Information & Public Relations Officer (DIPRO), and representatives from DEOC/DDMA.

Attachment

title: LUNGLEIAH POL LEH LPG DINHMUN THLITHLAI TURIN JOINT CONTROL ROOM SIAM A NI
content:
4897/2025-2026Lunglei, 2026 Vau thla ni 18:March ni 16, 2026 khan Lunglei District Bawrhsap Pi Navneet Mann chuan Lunglei District-a tuialhthei (Petroleum, Oil & Lubricants – POL) leh eirawng bawlna gas (Liquefied Petroleum Gas – LPG) awm dan leh sem darh dan thlithlai leh vil turin District Emergency Operation Centre (DEOC) chu Joint Control Room atan ruat a nih thu hriattirna a chhuah.

Hei hi ni tin mamawh khaihlak lova a awm theihna tur leh khawvel ram hrang hrang buaina kara mipui tiralkhel thei zawnga thuthang dik lo awm thei venna tura Joint Control Room siam tura Mizoram sawrkar thupek bawhzuina a ni a. Lunglei District Joint Control Room hi tihnun nghal niin, POL leh LPG hnianghnar dan dinhmun te, a kaihhnawih harsatna hrang hrang te vilin, he'ng bungruate chheprelh, a mantova zawrh leh mipui tichi-ai thei zawnga thu dik lo theh darh awm thei te veng turin hma an la dawn a. DEOC hi phone number 9862653478-ah hian biak pawh theih reng a ni.

Joint Control Room-ah hian Deputy Commissioner, Superintendent of Police, District Civil Supplies Officer, District Information & Public Relations Officer (DIPRO) leh DEOC/DDMA ai awhte an tel.

Attachment

title: PU B.LALCHHANZOVAN SAITUAL TOWN RESURVEY ROR SEM CHHUAK
content:
4896/2025-2026Aizawl, 18th March, 2026 :Vawiin chawhma dar 11:00 khan LR&S Directorate Conference Hall ah LR&S Miniter Pu B.Lalchhanzovan Saitual Town area a khaw 6 survey zawh tak te ah Record of Rights (RoR) a semchhuak.

He hunah hian Minister chuan thu sawiin, Revenue Departmentah thil thar leh tihdan tharte an kalpui mek zel a ni a ti a, chumi kawnga mipui thlawpna an dawng tha chu lawmawm a tih thu a sawi a ni. LR&S departmenta a thawhpuite chu a lian ber atanga a te ber thlengin mipui rawng an bawlna ah theihtawp an chhuah avangin lawmawm a ti a, an thahnemngaihna avangin SASCI Part VII-A hnuaiah mellung pawimawh ULPIN generation, Mobile number & Address seeding leh vawiina kan sem mek Standardised RoR hman avangte a incentive cheng vaibelchhe 29.57 kan hmu leh thei chu lawmawm a tih thu sawiin, hma lakna tur erawh a la tam hle a ni a ti.

Saitual town area a RoR semchhuah a ni ta chu Minister chuan kalphung thar a nih thu sawiin, hetah hian ram chungchanga hriat ngai leh tulte chu a awm vek thu sawiin hei hi a felfai zawk bakah a bo thu ah pawh LSC tihbo anga buai viau na tur a awm lo a ni tiin, Saitual District a khua la survey loh khaw 28 te pawh Drone hmanga survey zawh tawh niin, tun atanga reilo te ah Property Card 4423 semchhuah thuai a nih tur thu a sawi.Bialtu MLA Prof. Lalnilawma, Minister of State ni bawk pawhin a bial chhung khua a resurvey neih zawhfel a ni ta chu lawmawm a tih thu sawiin, kalphung thar sawrkarah tihdan tha zawk leh tharte huai taka an kalpui avangin LR&S Minister leh thawktute an fakawm a tih thu a sawi a ni.

Saitual Town resurvey hian VC area paruk huamin, ROR awm zat chu Sihfaah 285, Keifang Venghlunah 476, Keifang Venglaiah 164, Keifang Leitanah 364, Rulchawmah 361, Ruallungah 238 niin, a vaiin 1879 a ni a, heng zinga 1670 te hi peihfel niin, a dang 209 te hi documents la fel loh avanga la pekchhuah theih loh a ni thung. Heng RoR te hi Revenue Branch, DC Office Saitualah a neituten an lak chhuah tura ruahman a ni.

Saitual Town resurvey hi Buannel Geo Solutionsin thawkin March ni 11, 2022 ah hna tan a ni a, report hi April 25, 2023 ah an thehlut a. Buaipui ngai leh a hmuna enfiah leh ennawn ngaite Department lamin an ennawn hnuah, Caisias Research and Consulting ten RoR a hlawma siamna application an siam kaltlangin rang zawkin ROR te chu peihfel a ni.

Attachment
